---
title: "HW 9"
format: html
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from sklearn.cluster import KMeans
from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
from scipy.cluster.hierarchy import linkage, fcluster, dendrogram
from scipy.spatial.distance import pdist
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

path = r"C:\Users\spink\OneDrive\Desktop\Data Minning\Data"
```

## Question 1

Part a

```{python}
myData = pd.read_excel(f"{path}\\Ch14_Q1_V18_Data_File.xlsx")

myData_scaled = (myData - myData.mean()) / myData.std(ddof=1)
dist_matrix = pdist(myData_scaled, metric='euclidean')

hc_single = linkage(dist_matrix, method='single')

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
dendrogram(hc_single)
plt.axhline(y=5, color='red', linestyle='--')
plt.title("Dendrogram - Single Linkage")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

labels_a = fcluster(hc_single, t=5, criterion='distance')
print(len(set(labels_a)))
```

Part b

```{python}
hc_complete = linkage(dist_matrix, method='complete')

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
dendrogram(hc_complete)
plt.axhline(y=5, color='red', linestyle='--')
plt.title("Dendrogram - Complete Linkage")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

labels_b = fcluster(hc_complete, t=5, criterion='distance')
print(len(set(labels_b)))
```

Part c

```{python}
hc_ward = linkage(dist_matrix, method='ward')

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
dendrogram(hc_ward)
plt.axhline(y=5, color='red', linestyle='--')
plt.title("Dendrogram - Ward's Method")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

labels_c = fcluster(hc_ward, t=5, criterion='distance')
print(len(set(labels_c)))
```

## Question 2

Part a

```{python}
myData = pd.read_excel(f"{path}\\Ch14_Q9_V3_Data_File.xlsx")

X = myData[['Earnings', 'Cost', 'Grad', 'Debt']]
X_scaled = (X - X.mean()) / X.std(ddof=1)

dist_matrix = pdist(X_scaled, metric='euclidean')
hc = linkage(dist_matrix, method='ward')

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
dendrogram(hc)
plt.axhline(y=15, color='red', linestyle='--')
plt.title("Dendrogram - All Colleges, Ward's Method")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

labels_a = fcluster(hc, t=15, criterion='distance')
print(len(set(labels_a)))
```

Part b

```{python}
city_data = myData[myData['City'] == 1][['Earnings', 'Cost', 'Grad', 'Debt']]
X_city = (city_data - city_data.mean()) / city_data.std(ddof=1)

dist_city = pdist(X_city, metric='euclidean')
hc_city = linkage(dist_city, method='ward')

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
dendrogram(hc_city)
plt.axhline(y=10, color='red', linestyle='--')
plt.title("Dendrogram - City Colleges, Ward's Method")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

labels_b = fcluster(hc_city, t=10, criterion='distance')
print(len(set(labels_b)))
```

Part c

```{python}
noncity_data = myData[myData['City'] == 0][['Earnings', 'Cost', 'Grad', 'Debt']]
X_non = (noncity_data - noncity_data.mean()) / noncity_data.std(ddof=1)

dist_non = pdist(X_non, metric='euclidean')
hc_non = linkage(dist_non, method='ward')

plt.figure(figsize=(10, 5))
dendrogram(hc_non)
plt.axhline(y=10, color='red', linestyle='--')
plt.title("Dendrogram - Non-City Colleges, Ward's Method")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

labels_c = fcluster(hc_non, t=10, criterion='distance')
print(len(set(labels_c)))
```

## Question 3

Part a

```{python}
myData = pd.read_excel(f"{path}\\Ch14_Q25_Data_File_Static.xlsx")

X = myData[['x1', 'x2', 'x3']]
scaler = StandardScaler()
X_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X)

km2 = KMeans(n_clusters=2, random_state=321, n_init=10)
km2.fit(X_scaled)

counts2 = np.bincount(km2.labels_)
largest2 = np.argmax(counts2)
centers2 = km2.cluster_centers_[largest2]

print(f"Larger cluster size: {counts2[largest2]}")
print(f"Cluster center x1: {centers2[0]:.2f}")
print(f"Cluster center x2: {centers2[1]:.2f}")
print(f"Cluster center x3: {centers2[2]:.2f}")
```

Part b

```{python}
km3 = KMeans(n_clusters=3, random_state=321, n_init=10)
km3.fit(X_scaled)

counts3 = np.bincount(km3.labels_)
smallest3 = np.argmin(counts3)
centers3 = km3.cluster_centers_[smallest3]

print(f"Smallest cluster size: {counts3[smallest3]}")
print(f"Cluster center x1: {centers3[0]:.2f}")
print(f"Cluster center x2: {centers3[1]:.2f}")
print(f"Cluster center x3: {centers3[2]:.2f}")
```

## Question 4

Part a

```{python}
myData = pd.read_excel(f"{path}\\Ch14_Q33_Data_File.xlsx")

scaler = StandardScaler()
X_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(myData)

km3 = KMeans(n_clusters=3, random_state=321, n_init=10)
km3.fit(X_scaled)

counts3 = np.bincount(km3.labels_)
largest3 = np.argmax(counts3)
c3 = km3.cluster_centers_[largest3]

print(f"Largest cluster size: {counts3[largest3]}")
print(f"Cluster center Price: {c3[0]:.1f}")
print(f"Cluster center Beds:  {c3[1]:.1f}")
print(f"Cluster center Baths: {c3[2]:.1f}")
print(f"Cluster center Sqft:  {c3[3]:.1f}")
```

Part b

```{python}
km4 = KMeans(n_clusters=4, random_state=321, n_init=10)
km4.fit(X_scaled)

counts4 = np.bincount(km4.labels_)
largest4 = np.argmax(counts4)
c4 = km4.cluster_centers_[largest4]

print(f"Largest cluster size: {counts4[largest4]}")
print(f"Cluster center Price: {c4[0]:.1f}")
print(f"Cluster center Beds:  {c4[1]:.1f}")
print(f"Cluster center Baths: {c4[2]:.1f}")
print(f"Cluster center Sqft:  {c4[3]:.1f}")
```
